TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Katerina_Sakellaropoulou, title = Katerina_Sakellaropoulou, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Katerina_Sakellaropoulou} }

S.FORM: Katerina Sakellaropoulou ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 5, Katerina Sakellaropoulou, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Greece ta' misuw hya' ga Katerina Sakellaropoulou, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Katerina Sakellaropoulou minkahul sa Thessaloniki na Greece. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==

Katerina Sakellaropoulou ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 5, Katerina Sakellaropoulou, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Greece ta' misuw hya' ga Katerina Sakellaropoulou, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Katerina Sakellaropoulou minkahul sa Thessaloniki na Greece. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==
S.PHON: katerina s~ɕakellaropoulou rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, katerina s~ɕakellaropoulou, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣreeʦ~ʨe taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa katerina s~ɕakellaropoulou, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral katerina s~ɕakellaropoulou minkaħul s~ɕa tħes~ɕs~ɕaloniki na ɣreeʦ~ʨe. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ == ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun ==
